mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, created_at) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE role_id = role_id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND permission_id = #{permissionId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
